name: Deep Connection
description: Blind answers to deep questions. Reveal only when both have answered.

prompts.text: What was your exact first thought when we met?
What is something I do that always makes you smile, even if I don't realize it?
If you could freeze one memory of us forever, which one would it be?
What is a dream or goal you have that you haven't told many people about?
What do you think is our greatest strength as a pair?
